name: Yuki Tanaka
brief: I'm a UX designer at Spotify in Zurich. I got divorced in October this year — it was finalized on the 15th. My daughter Hana (5) lives with me most of the time. My ex-husband pays child support and spousal support starting November. I have a mortgage on my apartment but I can't find the property documents right now. My German is okay but not great (B1), so I sometimes struggle with official forms. I also took a German B2 course this year to improve. I don't think I contributed to Pillar 3a this year — things were too chaotic with the divorce.
